title: Mysterious Shadow
overview: High school biology teacher Lucas Amato finds a tube with a glowing green ooze and takes it home with him. The next night a woman named Cybersix visits Lucas to retrieve the ooze called Sustenance. But before she has a chance to get it, a big strange man breaks into Lucas's apartment.

title: Data 7 & Julian
overview: Cybersix's creator sends his bioroid black panther pet called Data 7 to kill her.

title: Terra
overview: Jose creates a mud monster from primordial ooze which can change its shape to counter any attack and sends it after Cybersix.

title: Yashimoto, Private Eye
overview: Jose tries to hire a detective to help him capture Cybersix. When he refuses, Jose kidnaps his sister and will only return her in exchange for Cybersix.

title: Lori Is Missing
overview: Lori bumps into Jose and accidentally gets her CD switched for the CD-ROM he's using to program his tunneling robot that's going to dig into the city's treasury.

title: Blue Birds of Horror
overview: Jose uses one of Von Riecher's creations to control birds and have them attack the people of Maridiana.

title: Brainwashed
overview: Jose uses special devices to brainwash six police officers and force them to hunt down Cybersix.

title: Gone with the Wings
overview: Cybersix is attacked by goblin-like creatures that seem to fear the light.

title: Full Moon Fascination
overview: After being bitten by a wolfman Lucas finds himself getting hairier and becomes fascinated by the new teacher.  Cybersix resents her influence over him but she's too busy fighting the wolfwoman Dr. Von Reichter has sent to hunt her.

title: The Eye
overview: Von Riecher gifts Jose a strange egg that hatches into a soul-absorbing floating eye. Jose takes the eye to the city and soon the entire population, except for Cybersix, is soulless.

title: The Greatest Show in Meridiana
overview: Jose builds a bunch of mechanical animals and starts his own circus, The Greatest Show In Meridiana. Suspicious, Cybersix goes to the circus, only to be captured.

title: Daylight Devil
overview: While on a school fieldtrip Cybersix is attacked by a techno with the power to become invisible.

title: The Final Confrontation
overview: A living island created by Dr Von Reichter begins making its way to Meridina harbour. It is programmed to explode once it arrives because he's tired of Jose's many failures and wants to wipe the slate clean.
